ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the model training (e.g., in_progress, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., linear regularization, max iterations) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the item */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the item */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "negative_sampling" (
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling strategy */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the strategy belongs to */,
  "sampling_strategy" TEXT /* Name of the sampling strategy (e.g., random, popularity-based) */,
  "sampled_negative_examples" TEXT /* Sampled negative examples */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date the sampling was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_negative_sampling_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., director, release year) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_attributes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the genre belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_genres_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_item_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_item_performance_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_item_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_item_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, purchase) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_item_interactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_item_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "item_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first item */,
  "item_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second item */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two items */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_similarity_item_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_2") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_similarity_item_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("item_id_1") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
